Increases the damage of Lichfrost by 20% and its Runic Power generated by 50%.

nodes.desc: Increases the spell power scaling of Lichfrost and Ice Barrage by 20%.

nodes.name: Foul Invocation
nodes.desc: Transform into an undead monstrosity for 20 seconds, increasing your maximum health by 30%.While transformed you are immune to Fear, Sleep, Charm, and Disease effects.

rankDesc.description:
Transform into an undead monstrosity for 20 seconds, increasing your maximum health by 30%.

While transformed you are immune to Fear, Sleep, Charm, and Disease effects.

nodes.name: Winds of Northrend
nodes.desc: Increases the amount slowed by Lichfrost by -15%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the amount slowed by Lichfrost by -15%.

nodes.name: Master Lich
nodes.desc: Soulfreeze now increases the enemy's Frost damage taken by you by 5% per tick for 8 sec, stacking 3 times.

rankDesc.description: Soulfreeze now increases the enemy's Frost damage taken by you by 5% per tick for 8 sec, stacking 3 times.

nodes.name: Deadly Defense
nodes.desc: Each of your summons now reduces your damage taken by 1%, up to a maximum of 10%.

rankDesc.description: Each of your summons now reduces your damage taken by 1%, up to a maximum of 10%.

nodes.name: Animate: Plaguefather
nodes.desc: Animate a Plaguefather to aid you in combat for 15 seconds. Damage dealt by this minion will emit Zombie Plague, dealing 79 + 10% SP Plague damage to nearby enemies, and reducing their attack power by 223.

rankDesc.description:
Animate a Plaguefather to aid you in combat for 15 seconds.

Damage dealt by this minion will emit Zombie Plague, dealing 79 + 10% SP Plague damage to nearby enemies, and reducing their attack power by 223.

nodes.name: Underking
nodes.desc: Casting Command spells now grants you a stack of Underking for 20 seconds.At 10 stacks, the cooldown of Animate: Tomb King, Animate: Bone Wraith or Animate: Plaguefather is reduced by -15 sec at random.

rankDesc.description:
Casting Command spells now grants you a stack of Underking for 20 seconds.

At 10 stacks, the cooldown of Animate: Tomb King, Animate: Bone Wraith or Animate: Plaguefather is reduced by -15 sec at random.

nodes.name: Waking Crypts
nodes.desc: Increases the damage of Crypt Plague by 50% and Crypt Swarm now deals 4% more damage for each Necromancer disease you have on the target.

rankDesc.description: Increases the damage of Crypt Plague by 50% and Crypt Swarm now deals 4% more damage for each Necromancer disease you have on the target.

nodes.desc: Reduces the duration of root and slow effects against you by -25%.

rankDesc.description: Reduces the duration of root and slow effects against you by -25%.

nodes.desc: Casting Command spells on an enemy now applies Crypt Plague.

rankDesc.description: Casting Command spells on an enemy now applies Crypt Plague.

nodes.desc: Increases the damage of Crypt Swarm by 15%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the damage of Crypt Swarm by 15%.

nodes.desc: Damage dealt by your Undead minions now reduces the cooldown of Virulency by -1 sec.

rankDesc.description: Damage dealt by your Undead minions now reduces the cooldown of Virulency by -1 sec.

nodes.name: Wormfood
nodes.desc: Upon fully channeling Crypt Swarm, you summon a Rotling that will run towards the enemy and explode after 5 sec for 320 + 33.5% SP Plague damage.

rankDesc.description: Upon fully channeling Crypt Swarm, you summon a Rotling that will run towards the enemy and explode after 5 sec for 320 + 33.5% SP Plague damage.

rankDesc.description: Increases the duration Unholy Frenzy by 5 sec and casting Command spells now reduces its cooldown by -1 sec.

nodes.desc: Each stack of Expunge now increases the target's damage taken from your Plague of Undeath by an additional 5%.

rankDesc.description: Each stack of Expunge now increases the target's damage taken from your Plague of Undeath by an additional 5%.

nodes.name: Command: Blight
nodes.desc: Command your Decaying Colossus to blight the ground in a 10 yd radius beneath it, reducing healing received by -60% for enemies inside for 20 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Command your Decaying Colossus to blight the ground in a 10 yd radius beneath it, reducing healing received by -60% for enemies inside for 20 seconds.

nodes.name: Frost Runes
nodes.desc: Dealing Magic damage now has a 15% chance to increase your haste by 10% for 12 seconds.

rankDesc.description: Dealing Magic damage now has a 15% chance to increase your haste by 10% for 12 seconds.

nodes.name: Lich's Prodigy
nodes.desc: Your Glacial Tap now generates an additional 20 Runic Power, but its cost is increased by 25%.

rankDesc.description: Your Glacial Tap now generates an additional 20 Runic Power, but its cost is increased by 25%.

nodes.name: Summoning Prodigy
nodes.desc: Increases the duration of Skeletal Archers by 3 sec.

rankDesc.description: Increases the duration of Skeletal Archers by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Raise: Ghoul
nodes.desc: Raise a Ghoul to aid you in combat occupying 1 Life Force. Its auto attacks restore 21 + 3.53% Intellect + 3.53% SP health to you.Command: Expels leeching plague that strikes up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 30 + 15.68% Intellect + 15.68% SP Plague damage, and healing you for 35 + 22% SP + 50% Intellect for each Ghoul.

rankDesc.description:
Raise a Ghoul to aid you in combat occupying 1 Life Force.

Its auto attacks restore 21 + 3.53% Intellect + 3.53% SP health to you.

Command: Expels leeching plague that strikes up to 5 nearby enemies, dealing 30 + 15.68% Intellect + 15.68% SP Plague damage, and healing you for 35 + 22% SP + 50% Intellect for each Ghoul.

nodes.name: Raise: Banshee
nodes.desc: Raise a Banshee to aid you in combat, occupying 2 Life Force.It will channel on your target, dealing damage and draining their mana over time.Command: Drains 20% of your target's mana (up to a maximum of 40% of their own maximum mana) and deals Frost damage equal to the mana drained.

rankDesc.description:
Raise a Banshee to aid you in combat, occupying 2 Life Force.

It will channel on your target, dealing damage and draining their mana over time.

Command: Drains 20% of your target's mana (up to a maximum of 40% of their own maximum mana) and deals Frost damage equal to the mana drained.

nodes.name: Mass Grave
nodes.desc: Transform up to 5 nearby enemies into a ghoul, fearing them for 40 seconds (8). Only affects Humanoids.While above 50 Runic Power this spell is instant cast.

rankDesc.description:
Transform up to 5 nearby enemies into a ghoul, fearing them for 40 seconds (8). Only affects Humanoids.

While above 50 Runic Power this spell is instant cast.

nodes.desc: Increases your spell haste by 4%.

Increases your spell haste by 8%.

nodes.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Mandates by 20%.

rankDesc.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Mandates by 20%.

When you cast Unholy Frenzy you now summon 3 Greater Zombies to aid you in combat for 14 seconds.

Damage dealt by your Undead minions now reduces the cooldown of Unholy Frenzy by -0.5 sec.

nodes.name: Expunge
nodes.desc: Casting Command spells on an enemy now applies Expunge if they are Diseased.Expunge (Talent)Increases the target's damage taken from your Necromancer diseases by 10% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

rankDesc.description:

Expunge (Talent)
Increases the target's damage taken from your Necromancer diseases by 10% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

nodes.name: Depravity / Mindless Fury
nodes.desc: Increases the melee haste of your Undead minions by 5% and gives their critical melee auto attacks an 50% chance to trigger Bone Club, dealing 40% of the damage dealt as Shadow Damage.

nodes.desc: Your Crypt Swarm now bounces to 2 additional nearby enemies, at 30% reduced value per enemy struck.
